creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
On 04/06/2013 19:50, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/177680'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=177680
> 
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       Move 'games/tmw' to 'games/mana'
>> Arrival-Date:   Sun Apr 07 00:50:00 UTC 2013

The Mana World project page also provides a download link for additional
'branding' materials for the official Mana client. In this case, this
branding can be added as an option or a slave port.

But again, these branding labels aren't necessary. The Mana project
supports several games outside of TMW.
